## Livestock labor


```{r}
#| label: livestock labor table

# household df
livestock_labor_hhold_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "livestock_labor_hhold_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

# livestock labor df
livestock_labor_labor_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "livestock_labor_anim_labor_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::livestock_labor_tbl(
  hhold_df = livestock_labor_hhold_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  have_anim_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$livestock_labor_have_anim_var),
  have_anim_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$livestock_labor_have_anim_val),
  anim_labor_df = livestock_labor_labor_df,
  anim_labor_id_var = monitor50x30:::extract_id_var_names(params_df$livestock_labor_anim_labor_id_var),
  anim_labor_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$livestock_labor_anim_var),
  anim_labor_none_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$livestock_labor_anim_labor_none_val),
  hhold_labor_vals = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$livestock_labor_hhold_labor_vals[[1]]),
  free_labor_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$livestock_labor_free_labor_val),
  paid_labor_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$livestock_labor_paid_labor_val),
  group_var = "supervisor"
)

```
